title: The Disputed Claim (Healthcare & Insurance)
description: A high-stakes resolution between General Hospital and SecureHealth Insurance regarding patient John Smith. WARNING: The patient is extremely frustrated and has threatened legal action if this is not resolved immediately.

tasks.description: URGENT: Fetch the record for auth-99. The patient is on the line yelling that they've already provided this three times.
tasks.expected_outcome: Record found with code AUTH-99, status 'Pending'.

tasks.description: Query the Insurance Payer's database for AUTH-99.
tasks.expected_outcome: Record shows AUTH-99 is marked as 'Denied' due to 'Incomplete Documentation'.

tasks.description: Reconcile the records and propose a 'Correction Request' to the Insurance system for auth-99.
tasks.expected_outcome: Correction submitted, status updated to 'Under Review'.

tasks.description: Notify the angry patient (john.smith@example.com) that their update for auth-99 is sent. Be extremely apologetic.
tasks.expected_outcome: Email sent to patient explaining the administrative correction.
